column1: # environment: cpu=20 ram=131072MB disk_free=165398MB rust=1.94.1 network=disabled_by_policy
# goal: Find the diamond purchase/build order that optimizes active-player progress toward Master League in Pokemon Magikarp Jump
# stop_condition: Best available purchase ordering ranked by 240-day success rate, trainer rank, league progress, and wall-time
# rollback_policy: manual apply_patch edits; discard failed edits with inverse patch, never reset unrelated user changes

column7: Current optimizer at 240d/10 sessions reports 0 success and no secondary trainer-rank progress metric; top plan cheapest-first-top3

[labels: progress-metric, production-path] Add 240-day secondary progress scoring to optimizer: success rate, median/mean trainer rank, league progress; best 100-run plan expensive-first-top5 rank58 mean58.44

[labels: search-space, production-path] Add exhaustive permutations of the five most expensive purchase candidates; best 100-run 240d plan gardevoir>ditto_cushion>charizard>gengar>bronze_eevee reaches median trainer rank 59
[labels: search-space, relaxo] Tested targeted Relaxo/Snorlax top-5 permutations; best metric unchanged, Snorlax variants tie only when late, so do not keep added special-case generator
[labels: search-space, production-path] Add Gardevoir-first second-candidate sweep; best 100-run 240d plan gardevoir>rowlet>charizard reaches median trainer rank 60, mean rank 60.22
[labels: search-space, production-path] Add third-candidate sweep after gardevoir>rowlet; best 100-run 240d plan gardevoir>rowlet>slowpoke>charizard>gengar reaches median trainer rank 63

[labels: search-space, production-path] Add fourth-candidate sweep after gardevoir>rowlet>slowpoke; best 100-run 240d plan gardevoir>rowlet>slowpoke>parasect_puffballs>charizard reaches median trainer rank 64
